narrative:
Precinct Pleasant Township (precinct in Seneca County) has 1,020 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.9 percentage points.
